metadata.description: Orlando's Claude Code skills marketplace — line-check, oj-statusline, and future skills, distributed via the native plugin system.

plugins.name: line-check
plugins.description: Per-line audit skill catching shell continuation-prompt traps and the SSH/tar bug class across PowerShell, bash, Python, Rust, C, and TypeScript. 5 checks + 6-item Pilot Pre-Send Checklist.

plugins.name: oj-statusline
plugins.description: Multi-line Claude Code statusline showing token breakdown (cached/new/total/ctx%), MCP and hook counts, and a soft-wrapped list of enabled skills with active-skill highlight. Auto-wires on SessionStart with idempotent silent install. Ships /oj-statusline:setup slash command for explicit one-shot setup. Optionally delegates to oh-my-claudecode HUD when present.
